observations.archetype_gloss: The Shadow represents the unconscious, repressed, or darker aspects of the psyche, often manifesting as opposition or challenge to the conscious self.
observations.summary: Dagon confronts Dan with a challenge to his faith and authority, embodying the Shadow archetype as a force of regression and chaos that opposes Dan's ascent and spiritual integration.

evidence.quote: "Your temple fell because of a blinded man," he snarled, the hesitation hardening. "You crumpled before the sacred chest. Why should I serve you rather than El, who dwells higher?"
